description: Composition:White vulcanized sneaker with silver swoosh branding and PU toe lip, Herringbone structured outsoleshoe care:1. Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washLook cool in these retro tennis-inspired pair from nike. The lightweight design and the silver swoosh add to the overall appeal. The shoe provides excellent breathability, Fit and flexibility. The herringbone outsole gives light to medium grip. Perfect for skateboarding and urban living.
